title: [FIRRTL] LowerClasses creates duplicate symbols for external modules with the same defname
code_blocks:
This can be compiled with:


I think the right thing to do here is to only create one class for each external module with that defname.

Note: the root issue here is a representational one where external modules with parameters are not actually modules, but instantiations of specific parametric modules. A much larger refactor to change this representation so that there was exactly one module for `Bar` that had parameters bound at the instantiation site and a way to represent the fact that the parameters affect the widths of ports would fix this. E.g.:
